title: pleuranthium scalpelligerum
intro: Pleuranthium scalpelligerum, also known as the 'hairy pleuranthium', is a species of plant in the family Asparagaceae, native to China and other parts of Asia. Traditionally, it is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs, and alleviating symptoms of the common cold. In herbal preparations, Pleuranthium scalpelligerum is often used in teas, infusions, or decoctions, or even as a component in traditional Chinese medicine remedies.
